Day advanced to 2026-02-28.
8,546 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
116 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 7 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-01): ['232393', '246419', '414228', '560525', '453556', '971319', '994042']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-27 -> 2026-02-28)

- "Which Israeli town will report nine deaths from an Iranian missile strike by March 1, 2026?" → Beit Shemesh
- "Who will be named the third member of Iran’s temporary three-member governing council by March 2, 2026?" → Ayatollah Alireza Arafi
- "What missile will the United States first launch from HIMARS against Iranian targets by 31 March 2026?" → PrSM
- "Who will be identified by March 15, 2026, as the captain of Iran’s women’s football team who withdraws her asylum request in Australia?" → Zahra Ghanbari
- "Which Gulf country will be described by March 18, 2026, as receiving more than half of Iran’s missiles and drones fired at Gulf countries?" → UAE
- "Which hospital will be reported as hit by airstrikes in Tehran by March 2, 2026?" → Gandhi Hospital
- "Which Guardian Council member will serve on Iran’s interim leadership council in March 2026?" → Alireza Arafi
- "What country will be reported as the base location of the US troops killed in Iranian strikes by March 2026?" → Kuwait
- "Whose killing will Hezbollah say its attack is avenging, by March 2, 2026?" → Ali Khamenei
- "What village will be named by March 8, 2026, in Palestinian reports as the site of an overnight settler attack near Ramallah that kills two Palestinians?" → Abu Falah
- "What conflict will Iranian officials cite as the reason for seeking a 2026 World Cup venue change by March 17, 2026?" → US-Israel war

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (214 resolved, 116 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
